title: ezAuctions
body:
![ezAuctions](https://i.imgur.com/gS3jvQv.png)

This is a text-based auction plugin that is available for servers running the Spigot/Paper/Folia software. This plugin allows for item tooltips which means you can hover over the item in chat and it will display enchantments, lore, etc.

*FOR MINECRAFT VERSIONS 1.11-1.19*  
Go to the versions tab and download plugin version 1.7.0 which supports 1.11-1.19. Plugin versions 2.0.0 and up only support Minecraft 1.20.1 and up.

Features
* Customizable messages! If you can see the message, you can change it! Messages all use MiniMessage for ultimate control.
* Configurable! Minimums, maximums, defaults, and more!
* Item tooltips!
* Scoreboard! An auto-updating display of the current auction!
* Item name translation! Works for different languages and resource pack names!
* Anti-snipe! Stop players from winning last second!
* Sealed auctions! Hide bids from chat!
* Auction queue and delays!
* Shows required XP for repair!

Commands
* /auction
* /bid

Requirements
* Server must be running Spigot or a Spigot derivative (including Folia!)
* Java 17
* Vault plugin installed alongside a supported Vault economy provider (EssentialsX, BetterEconomy, etc)

[A more in-depth command list](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions/wiki/commands)

[Permissions](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions/wiki/permissions)

[Config File](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml)

[Messages File](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions/blob/main/src/main/resources/messages.yml)

Suggestions? Issues? Please use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions/issues).

You can also contact me through Discord.  
[![Discord Link](https://i.imgur.com/Q2N376y.png)](https://discord.gg/2tAu2u2)

Source code available on GitHub.  
[![GitHub Link](https://i.imgur.com/6NFeFjd.png)](https://github.com/elian1203/ezAuctions)
